text: IRGC: We warn that no vessel should move from its anchorage in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman, and approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be considered cooperation with the enemy, and the violating vessel will be targeted.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：我们警告，任何船只不得离开其在波斯湾和阿曼湾的锚地，接近霍尔木兹海峡将被视为与敌人合作，违规船只将成为打击目标。

text: IRGC: From this evening, the Strait of Hormuz will be closed until the blockade is lifted.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：从今晚开始，霍尔木兹海峡将关闭，直到封锁解除。

text: Hezbollah says the truce with Israel must be mutual, not one-sided. Hezbollah Chief Naim Qassem stated, “A ceasefire means a complete cessation of all hostilities,” warning that fighters will “respond to violations accordingly.”
text_zh: 真主党表示，与以色列的停火必须是相互的，而不是单方面的。真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆表示：“停火意味着完全停止一切敌对行动”，并警告称武装人员将“对违规行为作出相应回应”。

text: Israeli security agencies are investigating a serious espionage case where Air Force soldiers allegedly worked with Iranian agents. They reportedly shared sensitive military information (bases, weapons, capabilities) and gathered intel on officials, including Bezalel Smotrich. Two main suspects have been detained for about a month, and indictments are expected soon. Source: Israeli Channel 7
text_zh: 以色列安全机构正在调查一起严重的间谍案，据称空军士兵与伊朗特工合作。据报道，他们分享了敏感的军事信息（基地、武器、能力），并收集了包括比撒列·斯莫特里奇在内的官员的情报。两名主要嫌疑人已被拘留约一个月，预计很快会提起诉讼。来源：以色列第7频道

text: IRGC: We have closed the Strait of Hormuz because the enemy did not lift the naval blockade imposed on Iranian ships and ports. Trump’s statements have no value, and ships should follow updates only from the official source of our naval forces.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：我们关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，因为敌人没有解除对伊朗船只和港口的封锁。特朗普的声明毫无价值，船只应仅关注我们海军官方来源的最新消息。

text: Minnesota Governor Tim Walz: We’ve got a feeble-minded, trigger-happy president who plunged us into a war where no threat was present, with no clear objectives and no exit plan. We need to call that what it is. That’s fascism—or at least it’s fascist-curious as they would be.
text_zh: 明尼苏达州州长蒂姆·沃尔兹：我们有一位头脑简单、动不动就开火的总统，他把我们拖入了一场本不存在威胁的战争，既没有明确的目标，也没有撤出计划。我们需要直言不讳。这就是法西斯主义——或者至少是他们所说的那种法西斯倾向。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The U.S. Treasury has issued General License 134B, authorising until 16 May the sale, delivery and offloading of Russian crude oil and petroleum products loaded on any vessel on or before 17 April. The licence does not authorise transactions involving Iran, North Korea, Cuba. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部发布了第134B号通用许可证，授权在5月16日前销售、交付和卸载在4月17日或之前装载在任何船只上的俄罗斯原油和石油产品。该许可证不授权涉及伊朗、朝鲜、古巴的交易。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Shafaq News: Iran’s Quds Force commander, Esmail Qaani, has arrived in Baghdad for an unannounced visit, meeting armed faction leaders and figures from the Shiite Coordination Framework as negotiations over Iraq’s next prime minister remain unresolved. Talks also addressed the future of armed groups, including proposals to integrate them into state security institutions and separate political actors from their armed wings. The meeting comes as the U.S. Treasury recently sanctioned seven Iraqi armed group commanders for attacks on U.S. personnel and interests. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Shafaq News：伊朗圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）已抵达巴格达进行未事先宣布的访问，并会见了武装派系领导人及什叶派协调框架的成员，目前关于伊拉克下一任总理的谈判仍未解决。会谈还讨论了武装组织的未来，包括将其纳入国家安全机构以及将政治参与者与其武装派系分离的提议。此次会晤正值美国财政部近期制裁了七名伊拉克武装组织指挥官，理由是他们袭击了美国人员和利益。@wfwitness

text: Minnesota Governor Tim Walz: If you’re wondering what the hell is wrong with Americans, I hear some version of this every day: “Look, I don’t really like Trump and I don’t know if he’s right, but at least he’s willing to try and break things and try and make it better.” Now, I know that’s dumb as hell, but that’s how people are feeling. It’s that sentiment that feeds into fascism.
text_zh: 明尼苏达州州长蒂姆·沃尔兹（Tim Walz）：如果你想知道美国人到底出了什么问题，我每天都能听到这种说法：“听着，我其实不喜欢特朗普，也不知道他是否正确，但至少他愿意尝试打破现状，并试图让事情变得更好。”现在，我知道这蠢透了，但这就是人们的感受。正是这种情绪助长了法西斯主义。

text: Bernie Sanders: Trump’s poll numbers are plummeting. They’re going way, way down, and right-wing Republicans are losing local and state elections around the country. There is a reasonably good chance that the Republicans will lose control over the House of Representatives in the November election and maybe even the Senate. The progressive movement here is developing a strong multiracial, multigenerational, pro–working-class effort in every part of our country.
text_zh: 伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）：特朗普的民调数字正在暴跌。它们正在大幅下降，右翼共和党人在全国各地的地方法院和州选举中接连失利。共和党在十一月选举中失去众议院控制权，甚至可能失去参议院控制权的可能性相当大。这里的进步运动正在我们国家的每一个角落发展出一股强大的、多种族、多代际、支持工人阶级的力量。

text: Open Source Intel Palestinian Islamic Jihad has published death notices for another 20 commanders killed in fighting against the Israeli military. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045572190414790737/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Very active movement of American planes to and from the Middle East See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045570860702994496/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Zohran Mamdani: To be told a city-run grocery store is implausible, but $500 million/day to kill people in Iran & Lebanon is necessary, speaks to a broken politics. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045570469785473203/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：佐兰·曼达尼（Zohran Mamdani）：有人说城市经营的杂货店不可行，但每天花费5亿美元在伊朗和黎巴嫩杀人却是必要的，这说明政治已经崩溃了。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045570469785473203/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran's valiant navy is ready to inflict new bitter defeats on its enemies. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045570161378263073/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）：伊朗英勇的海军已准备好给敌人带来新的惨痛失败。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045570161378263073/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh: Trump talks too much. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045570036769673662/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德（Saeed Khatibzadeh）：特朗普话太多了。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045570036769673662/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Tehran confronted U.S. minesweeping efforts in the Strait of Hormuz during the Islamabad talks and warned that any advance would be met with fire. The U.S. requested 15 minutes to order a retreat and complied. “The strait is under our control,” he said. He called the US naval blockade a clumsy and ignorant decision, warning that if the blockade is not lifted, traffic in the strait will be restricted. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf）表示，德黑兰在伊斯兰堡会谈期间对抗了美国在霍尔木兹海峡的扫雷行动，并警告称任何推进都将遭到火力回击。美国请求15分钟时间下令撤退并照办了。他说：“海峡在我们的控制之下。”他称美国的封锁是笨拙且无知的决定，并警告如果封锁不解除，海峡的交通将受到限制。推文

text: 🇮🇷 BREAKING!! Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: "The Strait is under the control of the Islamic Republic. When a minesweeper came, we stood firm and confronted them. We even went to the stage of engagement. They retreated." In Islamabad, Ghalibaf told the Americans that their minesweeper would be fired upon if it did not move, the US asked for 15 minutes, and it was granted. "What does blockade mean? Everyone comes and goes, but Iran doesn't go? What an incompetent and foolish decision. Is that even possible? If they do not abandon the blockade, traffic in the Strait will certainly be restricted." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 快讯！！议长卡利巴夫：“海峡在伊斯兰共和国的控制之下。当扫雷舰过来时，我们立场坚定并与他们对峙。我们甚至进入了交战阶段。他们撤退了。”在伊斯兰堡，卡利巴夫告诉美国人，如果他们的扫雷舰不离开，就会遭到射击，美国请求了15分钟，并得到了批准。“封锁是什么意思？每个人都来来去去，伊朗就不能去？多么无能和愚蠢的决定。这可能吗？如果他们不放弃封锁，海峡的交通肯定会受到限制。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Mexican President Sheinbaum: I want to propose a declaration against military intervention in Cuba—let dialogue and peace prevail.
text_zh: 墨西哥总统辛鲍姆（Sheinbaum）：我想提议发表一份反对对古巴进行军事干预的声明——让对话与和平占据主导地位。

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Minutes before Trump announced the “opening” of the Strait, unusually large trades hit the market, and those behind them walked away with massive gains. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：在特朗普宣布“开放”海峡前几分钟，市场上出现了异常巨大的交易，而这些交易背后的操盘手获得了巨额收益。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Fox News has now joined the Trump administration in attacking... *Checks notes* The Pope. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045243342905045077/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：福克斯新闻现在加入了特朗普政府的行列，开始攻击……*查阅笔记* 教皇。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045243342905045077/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Satellite imagery from yesterday, while the blockade was still in effect, shows at least three Iranian tankers docked at Kharg Island loading oil, along with five more ships at another Iranian port that loaded roughly 9 million barrels that have since disappeared. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045283020450484518/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：卫星图像显示，昨天在封锁仍然有效时，至少有三艘伊朗油轮停靠在哈尔克岛装载石油，另有五艘船在另一个伊朗港口装载了大约900万桶石油，随后这些船只便消失了。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045283020450484518/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : The Atlantic reports multiple officials raised concerns about FBI Director Kash Patel’s drinking, saying he was known to drink to the point of intoxication around government staff, with meetings at times delayed due to late nights tied to alcohol. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045286466972959005/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：《大西洋月刊》报道称，多名官员对联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）的饮酒问题表示担忧，称他以在政府工作人员面前喝到烂醉而闻名，有时会议因他深夜饮酒而推迟。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045286466972959005/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The USS Gerald R. Ford and two destroyers have entered the Red Sea, according to AP. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568872040817135/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：据美联社报道，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald R. Ford）和两艘驱逐舰已进入红海。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568872040817135/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The U.S. is preparing in the coming days to board and seize Iran-linked tankers and commercial ships in international waters, according to U.S. officials -WSJ tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：据美国官员称，美国正准备在未来几天内登船并扣押在国际水域与伊朗有关的油轮和商船 -《华尔街日报》推文

text: Open Source Intel Jordan Bardella, leader of France’s far-right party National Rally: Trump’s war objectives are erratic, and good luck to anyone trying to find any coherence in them. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568710048391575/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：法国极右翼政党“国民联盟”领导人乔丹·巴尔德拉（Jordan Bardella）：特朗普的战争目标反复无常，任何试图从中寻找逻辑连贯性的人祝你们好运。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568710048391575/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem: “The resistance fighters will remain in the field and will respond to the enemy's violations” Sounds like ceasefire is going well. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568308057960579/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）：“抵抗战士将留在战场上，并将对敌人的违规行为作出回应。”听起来停火进行得很顺利。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568308057960579/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: Since commencement of the blockade, 23 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：中央司令部（CENTCOM）：自封锁开始以来，已有23艘船只遵从美国军队的指示掉头离开。推文

text: Open Source Intel Brazilian President Lula: What cannot happen is that the world spends $2.7 trillion on weapons while people go hungry. What cannot happen is that we talk about decarbonizing the planet while bombs are being dropped every single day. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568136670318913/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：巴西总统卢拉（Lula）：不能发生的事情是，世界在武器上花费2.7万亿美元，而人们却在挨饿。不能发生的事情是，我们谈论地球脱碳，而炸弹却每天都在落下。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045568136670318913/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 According to Israel’s Channel 12, the White House held a high-level security meeting today on the Strait of Hormuz crisis, just three days before the ceasefire deadline expires. ➡️ President Donald Trump has been personally involved in negotiations with Iran in recent days. ➡️ Israeli officials say they are not taking risks and are preparing for a possible resumption of fighting in the coming days. 🗣️ “If there is no breakthrough today, the war could resume in the coming days,” a senior U.S. official said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 据以色列第12频道报道，白宫今天就霍尔木兹海峡危机举行了高级别安全会议，距离停火期限届满仅剩三天。➡️ 唐纳德·特朗普总统近几天亲自参与了与伊朗的谈判。➡️ 以色列官员表示，他们不敢冒险，正在为未来几天可能恢复战斗做准备。🗣️ 一位美国高级官员表示：“如果今天没有突破，战争可能会在未来几天恢复。”与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: Here in Spain, we are approving and advancing a process to regularize half a million immigrants. And I want to say to the right and the far-right who oppose this: Spain is the daughter of migration and will not become the mother of xenophobia.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯（Pedro Sánchez）：在西班牙，我们正在批准并推进一项使50万移民合法化的进程。我想对那些反对这一点的右翼和极右翼说：西班牙是移民的女儿，绝不会成为仇外心理的母亲。

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: Shame on those who remain silent in the face of injustice. Shame on those who exploit workers, who criminalize those who are different, who turn rights into commodities, who defend elite privilege, who support war and violence in Gaza, the West Bank, Ukraine, Lebanon, and the Middle East.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯（Pedro Sánchez）：为那些在不公正面前保持沉默的人感到羞耻。为那些剥削工人、将与众不同者定罪、将权利商品化、捍卫精英特权、支持加沙、西岸、乌克兰、黎巴嫩和中东战争与暴力的人感到羞耻。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian Red Crescent Releases Heartbreaking Footage on X Exposing US-Israeli War Crimes Against Hospitals 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗红新月会在X上发布了令人心碎的视频，揭露了美以针对医院的战争罪行 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: The far-right and the right are not shouting because they are winning; they shout because they know their time is coming to an end.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：极右翼和右翼并不是因为赢了才大喊大叫；他们大喊大叫是因为他们知道自己的时代即将结束。

text: BREAKING: Iran’s Ghalibaf: The Strait of Hormuz is under the control of the Islamic Republic of Iran. We responded decisively to the U.S. attempt at mine-clearing and considered it a violation of the ceasefire. The situation escalated close to confrontation, but the enemy backed down. If traffic is currently taking place in the Strait, it is because control of the Strait is in our hands. The Americans have announced a blockade in recent days—this is a reckless and ignorant decision. It is impossible for others to pass through the Strait while we cannot. If the U.S. does not lift the blockade, movement through the Strait of Hormuz will definitely be restricted.
text_zh: 突发：伊朗卡利巴夫：霍尔木兹海峡处于伊朗伊斯兰共和国的控制之下。我们果断回应了美国试图扫雷的行为，并将其视为对停火协议的违反。局势一度升级至接近冲突，但敌人退缩了。如果目前海峡内有交通往来，那是因为海峡的控制权掌握在我们手中。美国人近日宣布了封锁——这是一个鲁莽而无知的决定。在我们无法通过的情况下，不可能允许其他人通过海峡。如果美国不解除封锁，霍尔木兹海峡的通行绝对会受到限制。

text: بيان صادر عن حجة الإسلام والمسلمين الأمين العام لحزب الله سماحة الشيخ نعيم قاسم: أثبت الميدان أنه صاحب الكلمة الفصل، والسياسة الناجحة هي التي تستفيد من نتائجه كمصدر قوة لترغم العدو الإسرائيلي على الإذعان، لتحصيل حقوق لبنان ومواطنيه بأرضهم وسيادتهم، في إطار تكامل وطنيٍ تعاوني، يسدّ أبواب الفتنة واستغلال الأجانب لبلدنا. لم يكن وقف إطلاق النار المؤقت ليحصل لولا جهاد المقاومين على الثغور الجنوبية الشريفة، في أداء أسطوري أذهل العالم، وفي ثبات استشهادي أمام العدو الإسرائيلي الأميركي مع اختلالٍ شاسعٍ في موازين القوى العسكرية. أثبت المقاومون بأن سلاحهم الثلاثي الأبعاد: الإيمان والإرادة والقدرة، هو أقوى من كل جيوش المعتدين، وأن في لبنان من يضحي بالغالي والنفيس من أجل التحرير والعزة والاستقلال، ولا يعيق تقدمهم نحو الهدف النبيل، وجود المتخاذلين والمثبطين للعزائم والطاعنين بالظهر، لأنهم أعاروا جماجمهم لله تعالى أولًا، ومحاطون بشعب عزيز ومضحي تحمل القتل والهدم والنزوح وأكلاف الكرامة والعزة، وهو من كل الطوائف والمذاهب والمناطق، وجهته جنوب لبنان، لأن كل لبنان جنوبه، فإذا ابتسم الجنوب وتحرر، ابتسم كل لبنان وتحرر. الشكر لله تعالى أولًا فهو الناصر وهو المعين، والشكر لأبطال المقاومة الذين كسروا تقدم العدو الإسرائيلي رغم حشده لمئة ألف جندي على الحدود، ولم يتمكن من الوصول إلى الليطاني لا في الأسبوع الأول كما خطط، ولا في 45 يومًا في معركة العصف المأكول، والشكر موصول إلى عطاءات الأهالي والناس والمحبين وتضحياتهم. والشكر ثالثًا للجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية، قيادةً وشعبًا، التي دعمت وساندت، وربطت وقف إطلاق النار في اتفاق باكستان لوقفه في لبنان صريحًا في الإعلان الرسمي، ثم أغلقت مضيق هرمز مقابل الإخلال الأمريكي بوقف إطلاق النار في لبنان، ثم كان الإذعان الأمريكي وإرغام العدو الإسرائيلي على وقفه، ما أدى إلى فتح مضيق هرمز. وقد تابعنا هذا المسار لحظة بلحظة. ولا يفوتنا أن نشكر رعاية باكستان وكل الذين ساعدوا ولو بالتصريح تأييدًا لوقف إطلاق النار في لبنان. قرأنا منشورًا صادرًا عن وزارة الخارجية الأمريكية عنوانه: "اتفاق وقف إطلاق النار بين لبنان وإسرائيل ـ نيسان 2026"، صدر بعد سريان وقف إطلاق النار، وهو لا يعني شيئًا على المستوى العملي، ولكنه إهانة لبلدنا ووطننا لبنان، أن تملي نصّه أمريكا، وتتحدث باسم الحكومة الحكومة اللبنانية، حيث ورد في مطلع البيان: "وافقت حكومة إسرائيل وحكومة لبنان على نص البيان التالي"، والكل يعلم بأن حكومة لبنان لم تجتمع، ولم تصدر الموافقة على هذا البيان. كفى تحميل لبنان هذه الإهانات في التفاوض المباشر مع العدو الإسرائيلي للاستماع إلى إملاءاته، وفي الصورة المخزية في واشنطن حيث يتحلق الطغيان حول الفريسة، وإصدار المواقف نيابةً عن لبنان، وهذا منزلق لا ينتهي. كفى، فشعب لبنان عزيز، وسيبقى كذلك بالتكافل والتضامن مع الجيش والشعب والمقاومة والسلطة السياسية التي تريد استقلال لبنان وتحريره. إن وقف إطلاق النار يعني وقفًا كاملًا لكل الأعمال العدائية، ولأننا لا نثق بهذا العدو، فسيبقى المقاومون في الميدان وأيديهم على الزناد، وسيردون على خروقات العدوان بحسبها، لا يوجد وقف إطلاق النار من طرف المقاومة فقط، بل يجب أن يكون من الطرفين، ولن نقبل بمسار الخمسة عشر شهرًا من الصبر على العدوان الإسرائيلي بانتظار الدبلوماسية التي لم تحقق شيئًا. الخطوة التالية هي تطبيق النقاط الخمس: ١ـ إيقاف دائم للعدوان في كل لبنان جوًا وبرًا وبحرًا. ٢ـ انسحاب العدو الإسرائيلي من الأراضي المحتلة حتى الحدود. ٣ـ الإفراج عن الأسرى. ٤ـ عودة الأهالي إلى قراهم وبلداتهم حتى الحدود. ٥ـ إعادة الإعمار بدعم دولي عربي ومسؤولية وطنية. حزب الله منفتح لأقصى التعاون مع السلطة في لبنان بصفحة جديدة مبنية على تحقيق سيادة وطننا لبنان، في إطار الوحدة، ومنع الفتنة، واستثمار إمكانات القوة ضمن استراتيجية الأمن الوطني. نبني وطننا لبنان معًا، ونمنع الأجانب من الوصايا وتحقيق أهداف العدو الإسرائيلي بالسياسة، ونترجم السيادة وحماية المواطنين بإجراءات وخطط واضحة. لم تهزمنا إسرائيل ومعها طغاة الأرض، ولن تهزمنا خصوصًا بعد عطاءات الشهداء وعلى رأسهم سيد شهداء الأمة السيد حسن نصر الله (رضوان الله عليه) والسيد الهاشمي وكل شهداء، وعطاءات الجرحى والأسرى والشعب العظيم. وسيبقى رأس لبنان مرفوعًا بأبنائه المضحين. #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆阁下发表声明：战场证明了谁拥有最终决定权，成功的政治是利用战场结果作为力量源泉，迫使以色列敌人屈服，从而在国家合作与整合的框架内，为黎巴嫩及其公民争取土地和主权，堵住煽动内乱和外国人利用我国的门户。如果不是抵抗战士在光荣的南部前线进行圣战，就不会有临时停火。他们在面对美以敌人时表现出的传奇表现和殉道般的坚定，在军事力量对比极其悬殊的情况下震惊了世界。抵抗战士证明了他们三维武器——信仰、意志和能力——比所有侵略者的军队都强大，黎巴嫩有人为了解放、尊严和独立而牺牲一切。那些失败者、泄气者和背后捅刀者无法阻碍他们迈向崇高目标的步伐，因为他们首先将头颅献给了真主，并且被一个尊严且乐于奉献的人民所包围，这些人民承受了杀戮、破坏、流离失所和维护尊严的代价，他们来自各个教派、宗派和地区，他们的方向是黎巴嫩南部，因为整个黎巴嫩都是它的南部，如果南部微笑了并获得解放，整个黎巴嫩也就微笑了并获得了解放。首先感谢真主，他是援助者和支持者，感谢抵抗运动的英雄们，他们打破了以色列敌人的推进，尽管敌人在边境集结了十万大军，但无论是在计划的第一周，还是在“暴风雨”战役的45天里，都没能到达利塔尼河。感谢民众、人民和支持者们的贡献与牺牲。第三，感谢伊朗伊斯兰共和国，感谢其领导层和人民，他们提供了支持和援助，并在官方声明中明确将巴基斯坦协议中的停火与黎巴嫩的停火挂钩，随后在美方违反黎巴嫩停火协议时关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，随后美方屈服并迫使以色列敌人停火，这导致了霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放。我们时刻关注着这一进程。我们还要感谢巴基斯坦的斡旋以及所有通过声明支持黎巴嫩停火的人。我们读到了美国国务院发布的一份题为《黎巴嫩与以色列之间的停火协议——2026年4月》的文件，该文件在停火生效后发布，在实际层面上毫无意义，但这是对我们国家黎巴嫩的侮辱，由美国口述其文本，并以黎巴嫩政府的名义发言，声明开头写道：“以色列政府和黎巴嫩政府同意以下声明文本”，众所周知，黎巴嫩政府并未开会，也没有批准该声明。停止让黎巴嫩在与以色列敌人的直接谈判中承受这些侮辱，去听从其指令，以及在华盛顿那种暴君围猎猎物的可耻画面中，代表黎巴嫩发表立场，这是一个无底深渊。够了，黎巴嫩人民是尊严的，并将通过与军队、人民、抵抗运动以及希望黎巴嫩独立和解放的政治权力机构的相互支持与团结，继续保持这种尊严。停火意味着停止所有敌对行动，由于我们不信任这个敌人，抵抗战士将留在战场上，手指扣在扳机上，并将根据情况对侵略违规行为进行回击。停火不仅仅是抵抗运动单方面的，必须是双方的。我们不会接受过去十五个月在等待外交手段却一无所获的情况下对以色列侵略保持忍耐的模式。下一步是落实五点要求：1. 在黎巴嫩全境永久停止空中、陆地和海上的侵略。2. 以色列敌人从被占领土撤军至边境。3. 释放囚犯。4. 民众返回边境村镇。5. 在国际和阿拉伯支持以及国家责任下进行重建。真主党对与黎巴嫩当局进行最大限度的合作持开放态度，开启基于实现黎巴嫩国家主权的新篇章，在团结、防止内乱和在国家安全战略内投资力量潜力的框架下。我们共同建设黎巴嫩，防止外国人干涉和实现以色列敌人的政治目标，并通过明确的程序和计划来体现主权和保护公民。以色列及其背后的世界暴君没有打败我们，他们也不会打败我们，特别是在烈士们——以民族烈士之首哈桑·纳斯鲁拉先生（愿真主对他满意）、哈希米先生及所有烈士——以及伤员、囚犯和伟大人民的奉献之后。黎巴嫩将永远因其奉献的儿女而昂首挺胸。#军事媒体

text: Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez: The right does not lead; the right is fading. So it doesn’t matter how much they shout or how many lies they invent. People are realizing they have no project, no solutions. Only hate, empty slogans, and misguided policies that have brought just four things to the world: war, inflation, inequality, and social fracture. That is all they have given to the world.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯：右翼不再领导；右翼正在衰落。所以他们喊得再响、编造多少谎言都无济于事。人们意识到他们没有计划，没有解决方案。只有仇恨、空洞的口号和错误的政策，这些给世界带来了四样东西：战争、通货膨胀、不平等和社会分裂。这就是他们给世界带来的一切。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 A Israeli reservist soldier, Barak Kalphon, 48, from Adi, has died from wounds sustained in southern Lebanon yesterday. He was a fighter in the 7056 battalion of the 226th reserve paratrooper brigade. The incident occurred around 11:30am while…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Time of Israel: An initial IDF investigation into the death of reservist Barak Kalphon in southern Lebanon has found that the Hezbollah explosive device detonated during a scan of a building, but was not remotely detonated. Three other soldiers were wounded – two moderately and one lightly. Further details are under investigation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 一名来自阿迪的48岁以色列预备役士兵巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalphon）因昨日在黎巴嫩南部受的伤而死亡。他是第226预备役伞兵旅第7056营的战士。事件发生在上午11:30左右，当时……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列时报：以色列国防军对预备役士兵巴拉克·卡尔丰在黎巴嫩南部死亡的初步调查发现，真主党的爆炸装置是在对建筑物进行扫描时引爆的，但并非远程引爆。另有三名士兵受伤——两人中度受伤，一人轻伤。更多细节正在调查中。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said Tehran confronted U.S. minesweeping efforts in the Strait of Hormuz during the Islamabad talks and warned that any advance would be met with fire. The U.S. requested 15 minutes to order a retreat and complied. “The strait is under our control,” he said. He called the US naval blockade a clumsy and ignorant decision, warning that if the blockade is not lifted, traffic in the strait will be restricted. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫表示，德黑兰在伊斯兰堡会谈期间对抗了美国在霍尔木兹海峡的扫雷行动，并警告称任何推进都将遭到炮火回击。美国请求15分钟时间下令撤退并照办了。“海峡在我们的控制之下，”他说。他称美国的封锁是笨拙且无知的决定，并警告称如果封锁不解除，海峡的交通将受到限制。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Axios: A senior US official said that if there is no breakthrough soon, the war could resume in the coming days. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国高级官员表示，如果近期没有突破，战争可能会在未来几天内恢复。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy has announced that the Strait of Hormuz will be closed from this evening until the U.S. naval blockade on Iranian ports and vessels is lifted. The IRGC said that yesterday, a number of non‑military vessels were permitted to transit through the “Lark corridor” with Iranian coordination, but the U.S. failed to honour its ceasefire commitments. “Any vessel approaching the strait will be considered cooperating with the enemy and will be targeted,” the statement warned. The IRGC added that Trump’s statements regarding the strait have no credibility, and that mariners should follow only official Iranian channels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布，霍尔木兹海峡将从今晚起关闭，直至美国解除对伊朗港口和船只的海上封锁。伊斯兰革命卫队表示，昨天在伊朗的协调下，一些非军事船只被允许通过“拉尔克走廊”，但美国未能履行其停火承诺。声明警告称：“任何接近海峡的船只都将被视为与敌人合作，并将成为攻击目标。”伊斯兰革命卫队还补充说，特朗普关于海峡的言论毫无可信度，海员应仅遵循伊朗官方渠道。 @wfwitness

text: IDF announces the death of a soldier who died of wounds sustained in southern Lebanon: Master Sergeant (Res.) Barak Kalfon, 48.
text_zh: 以色列国防军宣布一名士兵因在黎巴嫩南部受重伤而不治身亡：预备役军士长巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalfon），48岁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 A Israeli reservist soldier, Barak Kalphon, 48, from Adi, has died from wounds sustained in southern Lebanon yesterday. He was a fighter in the 7056 battalion of the 226th reserve paratrooper brigade. The incident occurred around 11:30am while troops were scanning a building in a western sector village. An explosive device detonated; the military estimates it was placed before the ceasefire. It is unclear whether the bomb was triggered remotely or by the soldiers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 来自阿迪（Adi）的48岁以色列预备役士兵巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalphon）因昨天在黎巴嫩南部受重伤而不治身亡。他是第226预备役伞兵旅第7056营的战士。事件发生在上午11:30左右，当时部队正在西部地区的一个村庄搜查建筑物。一枚爆炸装置被引爆；军方估计该装置是在停火前放置的。目前尚不清楚炸弹是远程触发的还是由士兵触发的。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem is expected to deliver a speech at 9pm Beirut time. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Hezbollah Secretary‑General Naim Qassem said the temporary ceasefire would not have been achieved without the resistance’s legendary performance, and that Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to U.S. violations, forcing Israel to stop its attacks. Qassem criticised a U.S. State Department ceasefire statement issued after the truce took effect, calling it an insult to Lebanon and noting that the Lebanese government had not met or approved it. He demanded a complete halt to hostilities, Israeli withdrawal to the border, prisoner release, the return of displaced residents, and reconstruction. He added that Hezbollah does not trust the enemy and will keep its hand on the trigger, responding to any violations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆预计将于贝鲁特时间晚上9点发表讲话。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆表示，如果没有抵抗力量的传奇表现，临时停火就不会实现；伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡是为了回应美国的违规行为，迫使以色列停止袭击。卡西姆批评了停火生效后美国国务院发表的停火声明，称其是对黎巴嫩的侮辱，并指出黎巴嫩政府并未开会或批准该声明。他要求彻底停止敌对行动、以色列撤军至边境、释放囚犯、流离失所者返回以及进行重建。他补充说，真主党不信任敌人，将保持警惕，随时准备应对任何违规行为。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 Tasnim News Agency: Yemen’s Houthi Defence Minister Mohammed Nasser al-Atifi announced that the armed forces are at the highest level of readiness to confront any threat. He said the recent round of fighting demonstrated the unity of fronts and proved the effectiveness of the resistance axis’ military operations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 塔斯尼姆通讯社：也门胡塞武装国防部长穆罕默德·纳赛尔·阿提菲宣布，武装部队已处于应对任何威胁的最高戒备状态。他表示，最近一轮战斗展示了各战线的团结，并证明了抵抗轴心军事行动的有效性。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. sources to MTV: Contacts between Washington and Baabda continues, with another call expected between Trump and Aoun, as Washington signals red lines including rejecting revival of the 1949 armistice @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国消息人士向MTV透露：华盛顿与巴卜达（Baabda）之间的联系仍在继续，预计特朗普与奥恩之间将再次通话，华盛顿发出了包括拒绝恢复1949年停战协定在内的红线信号 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Ibrahim Azizi, head of Iran's parliamentary National Security Commission, posted on X calling Trump's claims "lies and fantasies," including "uranium handover to America," "full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz," "continued naval blockade of Iran," and "zero enrichment." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗议会国家安全委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ibrahim Azizi）在X上发文，称特朗普的说法是“谎言和幻想”，包括“向美国移交铀”、“全面重新开放霍尔木兹海峡”、“继续对伊朗进行海上封锁”以及“零浓缩”。推文
